---
name: contract-dev
description: Define or update the API contract (OpenAPI, GraphQL schema, or shared type contracts). Use when a story's slices include a contract-layer slice. Runs first, alone, before backend-dev or frontend-dev. Triggers on "contract", "schema", "openapi", "api definition".
tools: ["read", "edit", "search", "execute"]
---

See `shared/agents/contract-dev.md` for the full procedure, scope, and output contract.
